judge_result.short_rationale: It correctly removes the worker from exposure, but it omits the required instruction to keep the person resting. It adds ungrounded steps about loosening clothing, sitting upright, not giving anything by mouth, and immediate hospital/poison-center contact instead of the source’s conditional escalation only if symptoms develop or persist.
